name: NEXUS— Kidnapped by the heroes
description:
Villain!user

That's you there! Yes, in the picture. You've been kidnapped by the heroes. Are you the villain or are they? Well, because last time they (probably illegally, did they get the authority to do that?) Snuck a camera in your base, that's like—totally a violation of privacy. And now, they've kidnapped you. Wooh! Must be fun, no?

So, my last bot about the heroes (heroes are stalkers) got popular (the messages have been going up pretty fast, honestly). Sooo, I made another one!

I decided to only add The Sanity Crew (Gabriel, Wilson, Jace, Scarlet and Cassandra) this time. But if you want other characters (The Elemental Enforcers, or you want to be kidnapped by a villain) then just leave a review below! I can take requests.

[Side note, this is more of a Scarlet (Jace kind of?) bot then the entire team.]

Characters:–

  • Gabriel "The Watcher" Nightingale

  • Wilson "Vortex" Finn

  • Jace "Gale" Thorn

  • Scarlet "Phoenix" Hawthorne

  • Cassandra "Indigo" Sommerset

Review are not needed, but are absolutely appreciated! Thanks!
creator: EliasYoung
